_doc: Curated ecosystem map config. Hand-maintained, clearly an estimate — NOT live data. 'importance' is a documented 0-100 editorial weight (roughly: reach x strategic centrality), used only for node SIZE. Live momentum/glow is computed at build time from how many recent signals mention each node's 'match' terms (see scripts/lib/signals.mjs computeEntityActivity). 'layers' are conceptual depth bands, shallow (adoption) to deep (silicon). Model 'version' fields must match scripts/lib/models.mjs MODEL_REGISTRY — the single canonical source for current versions, also used by Community Pulse and Frontier Releases (see docs/METHODOLOGY.md).

layers.name: Cloud & compute
layers.blurb: Where the training and serving runs

nodes.name: ChatGPT
nodes.why: The most-used AI application; the front door to generative AI for hundreds of millions of people.

nodes.name: Copilot
nodes.why: Embeds AI across Windows, Office and GitHub — the widest enterprise distribution channel.

nodes.name: Perplexity
nodes.why: Answer-engine framing of search; a bellwether for AI-native consumer products.

nodes.name: GPT
nodes.why: OpenAI's frontier model line; sets the pace much of the field measures against.

nodes.name: Claude
nodes.why: Tops several public intelligence indices; strong on agentic coding and computer use.

nodes.name: Gemini
nodes.why: Google's frontier model, distributed through Search, Workspace and Android.

nodes.name: Grok
nodes.why: xAI's model line, tightly coupled to X and to very large training clusters.

nodes.name: Llama
nodes.why: The most widely fine-tuned open-weight base; the backbone of much of the open ecosystem.

nodes.name: DeepSeek
nodes.why: Chinese open-weight lab whose efficient training runs reset cost expectations.

nodes.name: Qwen
nodes.why: Highest-placed open/Chinese-origin model family on public indices.

nodes.name: Mistral
nodes.why: Europe's leading open-weight lab; a reference point for efficient mid-size models.

nodes.name: Microsoft Azure
nodes.why: OpenAI's primary compute partner and a top enterprise AI cloud.

nodes.name: AWS
nodes.why: Hosts Anthropic and Bedrock models; builds custom Trainium silicon.

nodes.name: Google Cloud
nodes.why: Serves Gemini and rents TPUs; a co-compute partner to Anthropic.

nodes.name: Oracle
nodes.why: Large-scale compute contracts with frontier labs have made it an AI-infra story.

nodes.name: CoreWeave
nodes.why: The archetypal 'neocloud' — GPU capacity rented to labs at scale.

nodes.name: Nvidia
nodes.why: The dominant AI accelerator and software stack; the single largest infra dependency.

nodes.name: AMD
nodes.why: The most credible Nvidia alternative in AI training and inference.

nodes.name: TSMC
nodes.why: Fabricates the advanced-node chips nearly every AI accelerator depends on.

nodes.name: Broadcom
nodes.why: Custom AI accelerators for hyperscalers plus the networking silicon that links clusters.
